'''Betha II''' was a barren, dry low-gravity [[Planet/Legends|planet]] covered in yellow-orange rock with very little [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] moisture. The planet was located in the [[Betha system/Legends|Betha system]] in [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]], at the midpoint of the [[Daranc Run]].

==History==
It was originally a more hospitable world with more atmospheric moisture, colonized by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] wherein it became a thriving port world. Because the planet dried up, it was abandoned. Betha II was resettled by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] millennia later, about [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. Since its surface was often swept dry by dust storms or sandstorms, the caves and canyons of the planet were expanded and connected with tunnels for subterranean habitation by the smugglers. The planet was discovered by [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] to be infiltrated by the [[Restored Empire|Kaarenth Dissension]].
